compiled_state.title: test-record-test-status-centrality.sh: 2 tests fail in CI ubuntu-24.04 -> pass locally on macOS
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Expected Behavior
All 26 tests in tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh pass in CI.

## Actual Behavior
2 tests fail in CI (ubuntu-24.04) but pass locally (macOS). Seen in CI runs 24450570102 (commit d10654da) and 24479200716 (commit 943fa5a1). The failing tests are not named in the CI log's 'Failed test output' section — they appear to be among the first tests (test_high_centrality_triggers_full_suite and/or test_low_centrality_runs_associated_only) which run before the verbose output section begins.

## Steps to Reproduce
Run tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh in ubuntu-24.04 CI environment.

## Suspected Cause
Likely environment difference between macOS (local) and ubuntu-24.04 (CI): ast-grep (sg) availability, git version behavior, or file timing differences in the centrality analysis.

## CI Runs
- 24450570102 (pre-existing, on d10654da)
- 24479200716 (post-merge, on 943fa5a1)

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 4 (INTERMEDIATE) — CI vs macOS environment difference
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Gate 1a: intent-aligned (high confidence) — CI failures are genuine defects against stated design goal of all 26 tests passing in CI
comments.author: Test
